writing.title: Writing Task 2: Explain cause and contrast
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) explaining cause, result, and contrast, using because/so/although/however.
writing.sampleAnswer: I was late because the traffic was heavy. It rained heavily, so we stayed at home. Although it was expensive, she bought the dress. However, she didn't regret it.
checklist: Dùng because để nêu nguyên nhân
Dùng so để nêu kết quả
Dùng although hoặc however để diễn tả tương phản

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Review — Rules, advice, and reasons
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 50 words) combining modal verbs (must/should/have to/might), verb patterns, too/enough, and connectors from Chương 7.
writing.sampleAnswer: You must wear a helmet, and you shouldn't ride too fast. You don't have to wear a uniform, but you have to arrive on time. It might rain, so take an umbrella. I enjoy walking to work because it isn't too far to walk.
checklist: Kết hợp được ít nhất 4 cấu trúc đã học trong Chương 7
Đoạn văn có mở-thân-kết đơn giản
Đủ số từ tối thiểu yêu cầu
